gates.name: Outreach Target List Approval
gates.description: Verification of the initial list of 25 outreach contacts prior to any sales contact.

gates.name: Statement of Work (SOW) Execution
gates.description: Founder signature required on SOW and contract before project kickoff.

gates.name: Pricing Adjustments & Discounts
gates.description: Any change to pilot pricing tiers requires founder email/written approval.

gates.name: Customer Credential Ingestion
gates.description: Handling or storage of client read-only environment credentials requires founder-approved storage enclaves. No secrets in Git repositories.
